title: Quality Control Plan — Luxury Eye Cream (Dark Circles)

sections.heading: Scope
sections.content: This quality control plan covers incoming materials, in-process controls, and finished goods release testing for Luxury Eye Cream (Dark Circles).

sections.heading: Incoming Material Controls
sections.content:
• CoA review and verification against approved specifications for each lot
• Identity testing on first receipt and per approved sampling plan thereafter
• Microbiological testing per risk-based sampling plan
• Visual inspection: appearance, packaging integrity, labelling

sections.heading: In-Process Controls
sections.content:
• pH check at each manufacturing stage
• Viscosity measurement at batch completion
• Fill weight verification (continuous during filling)
• Appearance and colour checks throughout

sections.heading: Finished Goods Release
sections.content:
Release tests as defined in Specification Sheet.
All results must meet acceptance criteria before batch disposition.
QA sign-off required for batch release.

sections.heading: Regulatory Disclaimer
sections.content: The regulatory information in this document is provided for guidance only. Please verify all regulatory requirements with your qualified regulatory affairs team before acting on it.

sections.content:

• TYMC: NMT 10 CFU/g
• Specified organisms: Absent

title: Stability Protocol Outline — Luxury Eye Cream (Dark Circles)

sections.heading: Study Design
sections.content:
• Accelerated: 40°C / 75% RH — 6 months
• Long-term: 25°C / 60% RH — 24 months
• Freeze-thaw: 3 cycles (-10°C ↔ +40°C)
• Photo-stability: ICH Q1B (where applicable)

sections.heading: Test Parameters
sections.content:
Physical: Appearance, pH, viscosity
Chemical: Active assay, degradants (HPLC)
Microbiological: TAMC, TYMC, PET at T=0 and end of study

sections.heading: Acceptance Criteria
sections.content:
• No significant change in appearance
• pH within ±0.5 units of T=0
• Viscosity within ±20% of T=0
• Active retention ≥90% of label claim at accelerated conditions
• Microbial counts within limits

sections.content: The regulatory information in this document is provided for guidance only. Please verify all regulatory requirements with your qualified regulatory affairs team before acting on it.
